newsSince: The 300mm wafer-bottleneck narrative strengthened since June 9: SUMCO shares hit an 18.5-year high on the AI-driven wafer-supply-squeeze outlook, Nomura raised its 2027+ 300mm demand forecast, and H2 2026 long-term-agreement (LTA) price revisions are now a sharpening catalyst expected to drive a FY2027 margin recovery. Near-term still shows an H1 operating loss; the rerating is forward-looking.

sources.label: BigGo Finance - SUMCO hits 18.5-year high on AI wafer squeeze
Yahoo Finance - Pre-earnings buying redefining SUMCO wafer demand narrative

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: genuinely new evidence since Jun 9 (Nomura demand upgrade, 18.5yr high, H2 LTA price-revision catalyst) reinforces 300mm tightness for AI logic/HBM and supply discipline. Strengthens the choke-point thesis; +2 and edge up despite +164% YTD.
verdicts.bull: 300mm structurally short into 2030; LTA price hikes lift FY27 margins; supply discipline (delayed fabs).
verdicts.neutral: H1 still loss-making; rerating is a FY27 story already partly priced.
verdicts.bear: +164% YTD; Chinese wafer price offensive; cyclical demand air-pocket risk.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO/co-packaged-optics lens treats wafers as indirect and cyclical. The same LTA/demand upgrade is real but several steps removed from the optics choke point, and +164% YTD already captures much upside. Hold; modest +1 only.
verdicts.bull: AI wafer tightness underpins the whole supply chain; pricing power returning.
verdicts.neutral: Indirect to CPO; cyclical wafer pricing/utilization.
verdicts.bear: Far from the optical-attach thesis; valuation discovery risk.
